title: Ubiquiti UXG-Fiber, uniFi Gateway Fiber
description: UXG-Fiber is a compact 10-gigabit router featuring a (1) WAN 10Gbps port, (2) 10Gbps SFP+ ports (1x WAN, 1x LAN), and (4) LAN 1/2.5Gbps ports, including one PoE-OUT port supporting PoE+ 802.3af/at. Despite its compact size, it delivers high performance with multi-WAN functionality, including load balancing and support for IDS/IPS . The router also supports various VPN types , including site-to-site VPN. Power is supplied via a 54V/1.1A power adapter, which is included in the package 5Gbps routing with IDS/IPS support (1) WAN 10Gbps + (1) 10Gbps SFP+ WAN (4) 2.5Gbps LAN + (1) 10Gbps SFP+ Multi-WAN + load balancing VPN support, including site-to-site VPN Device Patch cable 54V/1.1A power adapter
